data.label: __init__
data.docstring:
Creates an Activated Batch Normalization module

Parameters
----------
num_features : int
    Number of feature channels in the input and output.
eps : float
    Small constant to prevent numerical issues.
momentum : float
    Momentum factor applied to compute running statistics as.
affine : bool
    If `True` apply learned scale and shift transformation after normalization.
activation : str
    Name of the activation functions, one of: `leaky_relu`, `elu` or `none`.
slope : float
    Negative slope for the `leaky_relu` activation.

data.label: CASIA
data.docstring:
directory structure:
CASIA (dataset_path["CASIA"] in project_config.py)
├── CASIA 1.0 dataset (download: https://github.com/CauchyComplete/casia1groundtruth)
│   ├── Au (un-zip it)
│   └── Modified TP (un-zip it)
├── CASIA 1.0 groundtruth
│   ├── CM
│   └── Sp
├── CASIA 2.0 (download: https://github.com/CauchyComplete/casia2groundtruth)
│   ├── Au
│   └── Tp
└── CASIA 2 Groundtruth  => Run renaming script in the excel file located in the above repo.
                        Plus, rename "Tp_D_NRD_S_N_cha10002_cha10001_20094_gt3.png" to "..._gt.png"

data.label: _dct_2d_single
data.docstring: 对单个二维张量 (H, W) 执行 2D DCT-II。

data.label: _get_dct_matrix
data.docstring:
构造长度为 n 的一维 DCT-II 正交变换矩阵。

公式参考标准 DCT-II 定义，保证正交性：
    C[k, n] = alpha(k) * cos(pi * (2n + 1) * k / (2N))
其中 alpha(0) = sqrt(1/N), 其余 alpha(k) = sqrt(2/N)

data.label: _get_jpeg_info
data.docstring:
:param im_path: JPEG image path
:return: DCT_coef (Y,Cb,Cr), qtables (Y,Cb,Cr)

data.label: FullModel
data.docstring:
Distribute the loss on multi-gpu to reduce 
the memory cost in the main gpu.
You can check the following discussion.
https://discuss.pytorch.org/t/dataparallel-imbalanced-memory-usage/22551/21

data.label: dct
data.docstring:
一维 DCT-II 变换，作用在最后一个维度上。
满足：idct(dct(x)) ≈ x，且在测试中要求正交性。

data.label: dct_2d
data.docstring:
2D DCT-II 变换，作用在最后两个维度 (H, W) 上。
支持输入形状:
    (H, W), (N, H, W), (N, C, H, W), 以及更高维只要最后两个是 H, W。

data.label: dct_compress
data.docstring:
使用 dct_filter 对输入进行简单 DCT 压缩。
- 支持 3D: (C, H, W)
- 支持 4D: (N, C, H, W)
实际实现上，只要最后两个维度是 (H, W) 即可。

data.label: dct_filter
data.docstring:
在 DCT 频域中进行简单的低通滤波：
- keep_ratio=1.0: 保留全部频率，输出≈原始输入
- keep_ratio=0.0: 只保留 DC 分量 (0,0)
- 其他: 保留左上角一个 keep_ratio 比例的频率块
